title: TrimGallery
description: A Fabric mod that adds a creative tab with every vanilla armor trim combination, all visible to players without installing the mod.
body:
**Trim Gallery**

Every Armor Trim. All of Them.
A Fabric mod for Minecraft **1.21.11** that adds a separate creative tab containing all vanilla armor pieces with every possible armor trim pattern and material already applied.

✨ **Features**

Separate creative tab: **Trim Gallery**
All vanilla armor with all armor trim patterns and materials
Uses only vanilla items (no custom item IDs)
Armor is visible to all players, even without the mod installed
Fully server-compatible
No datapacks or resource packs required

⚙️ **How It Works**

The mod does not add new items
All variants are generated as **ItemStacks** with **ArmorTrim**
Uses vanilla **TRIM_PATTERN** and **TRIM_MATERIAL** registries
No custom rendering, **NBT hacks**, or asset overrides

📦 **Compatibility**

Minecraft 1.21.11
Fabric Loader
Works on any server
Client-side mod (server not required)

🧠 **Notes**

Total variants: **792**
Ideal for:
showcasing armor trims
testing and development
creative builds
armor trim collectors
